name: PeerLearn Local
description: Environment variables for Authentication & Profile testing. Base URL, JWT tokens, and user credentials.

values.description: JWT bearer token for authenticated requests. Obtained from POST /api/auth/login or POST /api/auth/register
JWT token for tutor user (for comparing roles in tests)
Test user email for login and password reset flows
Test user password (used in login and change password tests)
New password for password reset/change tests
Password reset token from forgot-password email (copy from actual email or test response)
User ID extracted from registration or login response (24-char MongoDB ID)
